intent: User query with inline form variable concatenated into SQL string — refactor to remove injection risk.
wrong: queryExecute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '#form.username#'", {}, { datasource: variables.datasource })

intent: Controller catch block returns raw cfcatch.message to the browser — fix information disclosure.
Silent catch block swallows exception without logging or rethrowing — add structured error handling.
Service directly accesses application scope instead of injected dependency — refactor to constructor injection.
FW/1 view populates rc directly with a service call instead of delegating to controller action — move data to before() or action method.
assistant:
<!--- controllers/main.cfc --->
public void function before(struct rc) {
  // Populate rc in controller lifecycle, not in view
  rc.users = variables.userService.getAll();
}

intent: N+1 loop query: issuing one queryExecute per ID in a loop — replace with a single batch query using list parameter.
Legacy structNew() followed by sequential dot-notation assignments — replace with CFScript struct literal.
Using cfparam with no type or default inside a function body — replace with typed function argument declaration.
wrong:
<!--- Inside a function --->
<cfparam name="arguments.userId" default="0">
<cfparam name="arguments.email" default="">

intent: Caching a hot-path query result without cacheId — add cacheId and cacheRegion so cache entries can be targeted for invalidation after writes.
Two repository insert calls made without a wrapping transaction block — partial failure leaves data inconsistent; wrap in transaction for atomicity.
Function accesses arguments.email directly without a presence check — add structKeyExists guard and throw with a descriptive message for missing required input.
